message:
feat(ufunc): add fixed-signature binary dispatch with dtype resolution

Split plan_binary_dispatch() into plan_binary_dispatch_with_signature()
for fixed-signature support in generalized ufunc dispatch.

- Add BinaryDispatchMethod enum (BuiltinPromoted vs FixedSignature)
  and BinaryDispatchSelection struct for structured dispatch results
- Add resolve_binary_output_dtype() to validate fixed signatures
  against input dtypes with proper error reporting
- Add error codes: ufunc_dispatch_resolution_failed and
  ufunc_type_resolution_invalid

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
